---
title: "extend_to_max_size"
generated: true
description: "Extend all tensors in a sequence until their sizes are equal to the size of the largest tensor along each axis. Any new entries created via extension are populated with `fill`."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.numerics.tensor_ops`](../nitrix-numerics-tensor_ops.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix._internal.util`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:extend_to_max_size -->
```python
extend_to_max_size(tensors: Sequence[Shaped[Array, ...]], fill: float = float('nan')) -> Tuple[Shaped[Array, ...], ...]
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:extend_to_max_size -->
Extend all tensors in a sequence until their sizes are equal to the size
of the largest tensor along each axis. Any new entries created via
extension are populated with `fill`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:extend_to_max_size -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `tensors` | `Sequence[Shaped[Array, ...]]` | — | — | — |
| `fill` | `float` | — | `float('nan')` | — |

**Returns** `Tuple[Shaped[Array, ...], ...]`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
